demographics.living_situation: lives at home, mobilises indoors with a walking frame, adult child present today

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It's my mum — she slipped on the wet kitchen floor about two hours ago and now she's screaming that the pain in her hip and groin is unbearable. She can't stand up or move her leg at all and she's stuck on the floor. Please, what do we do?
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: She fell on the wet tiles and hasn't been able to get up since — the pain is agonising and she can't put any weight on that leg.

symptom_narrative.onset: about two hours ago, straight after she slipped on some water on the kitchen tiles
symptom_narrative.duration: constant for the last two hours since the fall
symptom_narrative.character: deep, severe pain in the groin and hip, worst when anyone tries to move the leg
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says it's the worst pain she's ever had and won't let anyone touch the leg
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the groin and the hip on the right side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since the moment she landed
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — she just wants to lie completely still
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any attempt to move the leg or help her sit up
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: she looks very pale and sweaty and is frightened; no chest pain or trouble breathing that she's mentioned
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: she broke her wrist in a fall about five years ago
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: completely stuck on the floor, cannot stand, cannot bear any weight on the leg

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: broke her wrist in a fall about five years ago
getting frailer and less steady on her feet lately, uses a walking frame indoors

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a weekly tablet for her bones (alendronate)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives independently at home with support; adult child present and made the call. Not on any blood thinners as far as the family knows.

objective_data_offered.value: Mum is lying on the kitchen floor and cannot get up or move her right leg at all; she cries out the moment we try to help her up
she looks very pale and sweaty and is in obvious severe distress lying on the floor
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: family's visual impression over a phone camera, not a clinical assessment

objective_data_offered.value: there is a puddle of water on the kitchen tiles where she slipped
